top_signals.title: Russian saboteurs hired third operative for UK attacks
top_signals.summary: Footage points to the role of an unidentified man spraying anti-Muslim graffiti in London
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters for certain domestic and foreign banking organizations
top_signals.summary: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters for certain domestic and foreign banking organizations
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: IG4 Offers to Buy Raizen Debt in Quest for Majority Stake
top_signals.summary: Private equity firm IG4 Capital, fresh off a deal to take control of petrochemical giant Braskem SA, is now setting its sights on sugar and ethanol producer Raizen SA, another major Brazilian company in distress.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Set to Overtake Amazon in Value as It Soars for Third Day
top_signals.summary: SpaceX jumped for a third straight day on Tuesday, putting it on track to overtake Amazon.com Inc. in value and briefly making it the world’s fourth largest stock ahead of Microsoft Corp.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: OpenAI spending hit $34bn last year ahead of planned IPO
top_signals.summary: Audited figures reveal mounting costs from model development, infrastructure and rapid expansion
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Squid adds Ripple’s RLUSD stablecoin for cross-chain swaps
top_signals.summary: Cross-chain platform Squid has integrated Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin, allowing users to swap into and out of RLUSD across chains and assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
